Cut-and-Play Story and Craft Night

Date: Friday, January 2, 2026
Time: 6:00 PM - 7:00 PM
Ages: 5-10

About This Event

Join Emily for an evening of storytelling and hands-on creativity! Kids will learn to make articulating paper characters that bring fairy tales to life, using sustainable craft materials designed by Emma Friedlander-Collins from @steelandstitch.

What to Expect

  • Story Time: Listen to a classic fairy tale brought to life
  • Cut and Craft: Create articulating paper characters that move and play
  • Take Home Fun: Continue the creative fun at home with simple supplies
  • Learn Skills: Master techniques you can replicate with everyday household items
  • All Supplies Included: Everything provided for the event

These beautiful cut-and-play characters are designed by Emma Friedlander-Collins (@steelandstitch), a published author of multiple craft books and contributor to Mollie Makes and Simply Crochet magazines. Using eco-friendly materials, kids will learn sustainable crafting skills they can use again and again.

Registration

This event is $12 per person. All supplies included! Purchase details coming soon.

Registration is now closed.
